name: Easy Finance Auto Sales
description_short: Pre-owned auto dealership in Dallas offering in-house financing for all credit types with low down payments starting at $1,000 and flexible loan terms.
description_long:
Easy Finance Auto Sales is a pre-owned vehicle dealership established in September 2018 and located at 7051 C F Hawn Fwy in Dallas, TX. The company operates as a retail auto dealer that combines inventory sales with in-house auto financing, serving customers locally and nationally including out-of-state buyers. Their business model focuses on making vehicle ownership accessible through simplified purchasing processes and financing options.

The company offers a wide selection of pre-owned vehicles including luxury, classic, and everyday cars at competitive prices. Primary services include in-house auto financing available for all credit types (bad credit, no credit, or excellent credit), down payments starting as low as $1,000 (with approved applications), vehicle trade-in valuations, extended third-party warranties, test drive scheduling, and online loan applications. They employ credit specialists to assist customers with various credit situations during the financing process.

Easy Finance Auto Sales distinguishes itself through transparent pricing, flexible financing tailored to individual budgets, emphasis on accessible luxury vehicles, and a stated commitment to making the car-buying experience stress-free. The company markets around the tagline "Easy Buy - Easy Drive - Easy Life" and emphasizes customer guidance throughout the approval and purchasing process. Their willingness to work with customers across all credit profiles and offer in-house financing sets them apart from traditional dealerships requiring third-party lenders.

The primary caveat is that as an auto dealer offering in-house financing rather than a credit repair or traditional lender, their financing terms, rates, and loan conditions are not disclosed on the website. Customers should verify APR, loan terms, and actual approval odds before applying. The company was established relatively recently (2018) compared to established financial institutions, and extended warranties are provided through third-party providers rather than in-house.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: In-house financing available for all credit types including bad credit and no credit situations
Low down payments starting at $1,000 (with approved applications)
Wide selection of vehicle types including luxury, classic, and everyday cars
Free test drive scheduling and online application process
Trade-in program with stated competitive trade-in values
Extended warranty options through trusted third-party provider
Serves out-of-state customers in addition to local Dallas market
Credit specialists on staff to assist with credit-related concerns during financing
cons: No APR, interest rates, or specific loan term information disclosed on website
Limited transparency on approval criteria and actual approval odds for various credit profiles
Extended warranties provided through third-party providers rather than direct in-house coverage
Relatively new business established only in September 2018 compared to established lenders
No information on repossession policies, late payment penalties, or loan default procedures
best_for: Used car buyers with poor or no credit history seeking in-house dealer financing
Consumers wanting to finance a vehicle purchase without third-party lender requirements
Buyers seeking luxury or classic pre-owned vehicles at accessible price points
Out-of-state customers unable to visit traditional local dealerships in person
diagnosis: Easy Finance Auto Sales is best for used car buyers with limited or poor credit who need in-house dealer financing without traditional lender involvement. The main caveat is that APR, loan terms, and actual approval odds are not disclosed publicly—customers must contact them directly to understand true borrowing costs before committing to an application.
services: Pre-owned vehicle sales (luxury, classic, and everyday cars)
In-house auto financing for all credit types
Online loan applications and pre-approval process
Vehicle trade-in valuations and trade-in credit
Flexible financing options tailored to individual budgets
Customer guidance through approval and purchasing process
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7051 C F Hawn Fwy, Dallas, TX 75217
